hint: estos → esos · default for mixed groups

front: I get burnt in the sun.
Those ones break all the time.
back: Esos se rompen todo el tiempo.

hint: verb agrees with the thing left

front: I used to have a big house.
We used to have a big house.
I had to see you yesterday.
I used to be a student.
I was going to call you.
I was going to do it.
We were going to do it.
This car breaks all the time.
back: Este auto se rompe todo el tiempo.

front: We were getting burnt in the sun.
These cars break all the time.
back: Estos autos se rompen todo el tiempo.

front: We don't have any left. (one thing)
We don't have any left. (several things)
How is it said in Spanish?
I had four, but now none are left.
back: Tenía cuatro, pero ahora no me queda.

front: Did you have to do it yesterday?
We used to maintain the house.
